title: Warm up
content: The slide features images related to three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a person engaged in a distinct activity representing the respective city's characteristics.
key_claims: Beijing image shows driving with urban backdrop

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide serves as a visual introduction, titled 'A Ride Through China'. It presents images depicting taxis and cityscapes to emphasize the ongoing development within China.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session involves investigating and researching various city features. The process includes identifying local features, formulating development strategies, and assessing outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with specific development strategies. Beijing focuses on integrating technology and tradition, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The perspectives of taxi drivers highlight the development strategies of cities: sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration. Each city uses local features to enhance development.
key_claims: Cities utilize local features for growth
因地制宜 - adapting to local conditions
